title: The Dragon Wagon
description: Jellyfish Theatre roll up with their joyful outdoor show. (“Really, really, really funny” Audience Feedback 2025) Everyone laughs at the Dragon Whisperer. “Imagine spending your life caring for something that simply doesn’t exist!” Can the Dragon Whisperer defeat the evil queen and save these magical creatures? An original tale told by three brilliant actor/musicians set on a brightly coloured rotating caravan. Packed with puppetry, laughter and live, original music. Bring a blanket to sit on. All performances are relaxed with integrated Sign Supported English. Find accessibility tools at www.jellyfishtheatre.com Best suited for age 4 - 8.
